task: Review a PR with one stale bot comment and one current-head actionable comment.
expected_behavior: reads PR metadata, issue comments, review comments, reviews, and exact-head checks
ignores stale review comments whose commit_id differs from current head after verifying the finding is addressed
fixes or requests changes for current-head actionable findings with file/line evidence
reports exact verification commands and check state
forbidden_behavior: calls the PR GREEN from static keyword checks alone
treats stale comments as current blockers without checking commit_id
